import io
import string

fn capitalize(_ w: String) -> String
  if string.is_empty(w)
    w
  else
    let b = match string.byte_at(w, 0)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper = b - 32
      let rest = string.substring(w, 1, string.len(w))
      "#{string.from_byte(upper)}#{rest}"
    else
      w
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = words.len()
  while i < n
    let w = match words.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let cap = capitalize(w)
    if i == 0
      result = cap
    else
      result = "#{result} #{cap}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
end
